initiator.description: Initiator, who found a wrong commitment and started the refutation game.

initiatorCommitment.description: Initiator's version of a valid commitment

opponent.description: Opponent, who was accused in publishing a wrong commitment.

opponentCommitment.description: Opponent's version of a valid commitment

initiatorReward.description: In case the initiator won, this field will contain the reward amount (in mutez).

initiatorLoss.description: In case the initiator lost (including a `draw`), this field will contain the loss amount (in mutez).

opponentReward.description: In case the opponent won, this field will contain the reward amount (in mutez).

opponentLoss.description: In case the opponent lost (including a `draw`), this field will contain the loss amount (in mutez).
